state_semantics.low_window: ball q mod 3^3, q==2 mod 3 (9 states)
state_semantics.top_window: first 6 base-4 digits of u=m/3^k (4096 windows); DEPTH-MEMORY register, not static residue (<4>-orbit of -1 fills Q_J, so residue-E is vacuous)
state_semantics.exceptional_charge_rule: b(e)=1 iff TARGET window uncovered: S = {tail+B2 shift adds}, A = {B8 affine adds}; covered iff |S|=3 or |A|=3; -1 spine (all-3 digits) is uncovered forever
state_semantics.cone_cell: HYPOTHESIS (not proved): all admissible input profiles in C_K, K=2 (empirical max 1.87 at k=15,16); D-interval [3/(2K+1),1] dominates every minimizing policy within C_K; K-degradation table in blocks_tau.csv

weights_lambda2_exact.proof: 2^alpha=3 exactly; alpha sandwich 50508/31867 < alpha < 24727/15601 by integer power comparison (exact_weights.py)

transitions.T: q->4q mod 27; window shifts left, new digit e (4 edges, p/4)
transitions.B2: q==2(9): R2(q)+i*9; window shifts left (12 edges, q2/12)
transitions.B8: q==8(9): R8(q)+i*9; window x2-map e_i=2d_i mod4+[d_{i+1}>=2], last-digit carry c (6 edges, q8/6)
transitions.model: ANNEALED U-SPLIT (hypothesis U): new-digit mass share sigma; Haar sigma=1/4 used; measured on certified k=15,16 vectors: sigma_max=0.419/0.343, mass-weighted 0.2514/0.2505; borrow (-1 cylinder) edges are k-boundary terms of Haar measure O(3^-k 4^Lw), verified exhaustively at k=9,10 (validate2.py T1)

phase8.note: L_w=6 never covers phase 8; covered fraction 0.377 at L=9 (needs L_w>=9)

localization.bad_block_amplification: C=1 projectively: every block matrix has no zero rows (verified for all 12288 (phase,window)) => Hilbert-metric nonexpansive; envelope row bound C_row <= 5/3 + eps at lambda=2, K=2 (blocks_tau.csv)
localization.charge_density: osc > t forces all but O_t(1) visited states to be uncovered (each covered visit contracts d_H by tau); sufficient rational density theta = a/b = 60/64 = 15/16
localization.model_caveat: single-profile envelope: block terms treat sibling/transport inputs as one profile; the honest multi-input (product-cone) contraction is NOT certified here -- this is the remaining Lemma-3 model gap

restricted_gap_ECH1.statement: sum over unc->unc edges w_e h(q') <= R_unc h(q)

tilted_ECH2.statement: sum_e w_e z^{b(e)} h(q') <= R h(q), all 36864 rows
tilted_ECH2.gap: R^64 < z^60, exact integer comparison, PASS

verdict.off_exceptional_contraction: YES on covered states (tau<1 exact) for phases 2,5; phase 8 empty at L_w=6
verdict.aligned_leak: face cone (option a): 2x2 face contracts (tau_face <= 0.539/0.539/0.963 by phase, clean-face half); pinned-scale multiplier interval [0.600,1.667] CONTAINS 1: marginal mode, cannot close alone. Charge treatment (option b): CLOSES in-model: R_unc = 52435/57248 < 1 and R^64 < z^60 with theta=15/16 < 1 available from localization.
remaining_hypotheses: U(sigma): u-digit mass split; worst-case measured 0.343-0.419 (need <= 0.273 for pointwise closure R_unc*4sigma<1 at (3,6); mass-weighted 0.2505 closes with margin 0.918)
C_K product-cone invariance (K=2), incl. sibling cross-fiber independence -- single-profile envelope not yet dominated
uniform lambda in [lam18,2] version (only lambda=2 emitted here; tau uniform data present in blocks_tau.csv)
